basic_details.job_title: RCB Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) has officially announced the Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. 18/Project/2026/HR. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://www.rcb.res.in/. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria and hold an M.Sc./ M.Tech. in Life Sciences or related biological science disciplines with at least 60% marks, along with the required research experience and national-level eligibility qualifications such as NET/ GATB/ GATE, can now submit their online applications up to 02 Jul

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M. Tech. in Life Sciences or related biological science disciplines with at least 60% marks.
qualification.details: Project Technical Support-III: M.Sc./M. Tech. in Life Sciences or related biological science disciplines from recognized Universities or equivalent, with at least 60% marks. Experience Certificate from the PI(s) showing applicant's skill in working with virus preferably dengue virus. Conducting experiments using small animals.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project Technical Support III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RCB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. RCB Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support-III: M.Sc./M. Tech. in Life Sciences or related biological science disciplines from recognized Universities or equivalent, with at least 60% marks. Experience Certificate from the PI(s) showing applicant's skill in working with virus preferably dengue virus. Conducting experiments using small animals.

RCB Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RCB Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Technical Support-III position at RCB is 02-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc./M. Tech. in Life Sciences or related biological science disciplines with at least 60% marks. Relevant experience is also a key requirement.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the RCB Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Technical Support-III role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and finally an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support-III announced by the Regional Centre for Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the RCB Project Technical Support-III recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official RCB website.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with experience in working with viruses, particularly the dengue virus, and those who have conducted experiments using small animals.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key dates to remember for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The important dates include the last date to apply (02-07-2026), shortlist intimation (06-07-2026), and the online interview (08-07-2026).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
